name.description: Workspace display name used in UI, PR annotations, and branch templates
Project identifier referenced in depends_on lists

path.description: Relative path from workspace root to the project directory

depends_on.description: Project names that must complete before this project starts

command.description: Shell command for cross-project integration tests

working_dir.description: Working directory relative to workspace root

umbrella_repo.description: GitHub org/repo for the umbrella issue linking all workspace PRs
